testimonials.title: WHAT CUSTOMERS SAY ABOUT LE DAT
testimonials.description: Real feedback from customers who used our moving services

items.name: Phuong Linh
items.content: The team arrived on time and handled everything with care. Items were well protected and nothing was lost.

items.name: My Linh
items.content: Pricing was transparent from the start with no hidden fees. Friendly crew and very professional dismantling support.

items.name: Le Han Ny
items.content: I moved my rental room on the weekend and got a truck quickly. Fast handling, fair price, and very helpful support.
